page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Cell type deconvolution using single cell data
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Scaden is a deep-learning based algorithm for cell type deconvolution of bulk RNA-seq samples. It was developed at the DZNE Tübingen and the ZMNH in Hamburg. The method is published in Science Advances: Deep-learning based cell composition analysis from tissue expression profiles.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Scaden is a deep-learning based algorithm for cell type deconvolution of bulk RNA-seq samples. It was developed at the DZNE Tübingen and the ZMNH in Hamburg. The method is published in Science Advances: Deep-learning based cell composition analysis from tissue expression profiles.
